headline: I am Laia, I’ll build this website.

modules.title: Email

modules.title: Current engagements
modules.summary: Most active: Color Farm / Dharma, ForwardFooding, Yurbban, ZenHammer.
items: Color Farm / Dharma — platform/app setup, access, recordings, implementation coordination.
ForwardFooding — Data Navigator 2.0 data cleanup, taxonomy, imports, demos.
Yurbban — proposal / MSA review for AI consulting / fractional CTO support.
ZenHammer — payment workflow, NMI / SwipeSum, onboarding and KYC concerns.

modules.title: Assistant status
modules.summary: Email watcher runs every 30 minutes from 09:00 to 18:00 and only notifies when something important appears.
items: GitHub Pages site is live and can be used as a lightweight dashboard.
